name: Integrated Circuit (IC)
tagline: Multiple transistors and components fabricated on a single semiconductor die
problem:
As circuits grow, wiring discrete components becomes a reliability and scale problem: solder joints fail, parasitics dominate, and assembly time explodes.

Integrated circuits solve this by fabricating many devices together on one substrate, shrinking size, improving reliability, and enabling complex systems.
overview:
ICs use photolithography and thin-film processes to pattern transistors, interconnects, and passivation on silicon. Design and manufacturing are tightly coupled: yield and defect control matter as much as schematic logic.

For The Codex, ICs represent a major threshold: the required cleanliness, materials purity, and equipment are far beyond primitive industry, so early rebuild paths rely on importing ICs and building robust systems around them.

principles.name: Photolithography
principles.explanation: Pattern transfer at small scales enables dense circuits.

principles.name: Planar processing
principles.explanation: Oxides and passivation stabilize surfaces and junctions.

principles.name: Yield and defects
principles.explanation: Complexity increases defect sensitivity; process control dominates economics.

rawMaterials.name: Silicon and dopants
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Import packaged ICs early; local IC fab requires cleanrooms, ultrapure chemicals, and precision tooling.
rawMaterials.processingRequired: Ultrapure processing, lithography, and controlled diffusion/implant.

rawMaterials.name: Ultrapure chemicals
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Closed-loop chemical management is mandatory off-world; waste handling is safety-critical.

buildSteps.title: Design for manufacturability
buildSteps.description: Choose process node constraints; design test structures and margins.
buildSteps.warningNote: A design that cannot be tested is not a product.

buildSteps.title: Fabricate wafers
buildSteps.description: Run lithography, doping, deposition, and etch steps with strict process logs.
buildSteps.warningNote: Toxic and corrosive chemicals require professional safety systems.

buildSteps.title: Test and package
buildSteps.description: Probe wafers, dice, package, and perform burn-in screening.
buildSteps.warningNote: ESD and thermal overstress can destroy devices.

history.event: MOS and scaling drive complexity growth.
Multi-layer interconnect and advanced nodes dominate.

impact:
ICs enable computers, communications, and control systems at scales impossible with discrete components. They also create global supply-chain dependencies on specialized manufacturing.

In The Codex, ICs are both a pinnacle manufacturing node and a dependency anchor for advanced computing and AI.

sources.title: Sze & Ng — Physics of Semiconductor Devices
